feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Procurement Overview Page
entry.content:
hi SAP,

 

I am trying to implement the standard Fiori app 'Procurement Overview Page' (

Yes, its working fine when we test the tile.

 

But when we make reference to other Role (ZM_MM_PR_DISP).. I am able to see the tile in my Launchpad. But when I open the app, I didn't get any analytical information.  its empty.

 

We have reviewed sapnote 3420320 - Procurement overview does not show any card, but not clear about it.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP QM Fiori tile results recording worklist the RR user interface pop up needs to disabled
entry.content:
SAP QM Fiori tile results recording worklist the results recording user interface (Documentation) pop up needs to disabled


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Not able to delete WH BIN- FS10-0004 ( /SCWM/LC1023)
entry.content: 1.

entry.title: Problem in OABC
entry.content:
Dear SAP,


Why in OABC is it available to set “Adoption of Values from Depreciation Area” as “empty” (00) for entries that is flagged in OADB as “4-Area Posts APC Immediately and Depreciation”?


<see file attached>


Why it is not possible to set “Adoption of Values from Depreciation Area” as “empty” (00) for entries that in OADB as “3- Area Posts Depreciation Only”?


What is  the main difference between option 3- Area Posts Depreciation Only”and “4-Area Posts APC Immediately and Depreciation” on AA side?


Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Flexible Work flow for purchase order
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We want to introduce approval level for PO workflow , which sends an email to approver and then complete the workflow. Request you to guide with the steps and process to be implemented.

Regards

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to execute Adaptation Project from WebIde
entry.content:
1. Create  an Adaptation project in WebIde for Standard Application – Manage Purchase Requisition Professional – F2229 in Safe/Advanced mode.
  2. Right click on the project . Choose Run -> Run flpSandbox.html or Run as Web Application or any other option.
  3. Application does not load. Only a blank page appears.

entry.title: How to bypass the SAML2 IdP selection screen for SAP NetWeaver ABAP
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to bypass the SAML IDP selection page? 

How do you ensure the SAML2 IDP is automatically selected? 

Thanks and Best Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Default Measuring point Category to Equipment Category
entry.content: Is there any option available to default measuring point category to equipment category?

entry.title: How to copy customizing settings from a Company code to a new one?
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

Is there a tool or a way in S/4HANA Public Cloud to copy customizing settings from a Company code to a newly created one?

The reason for my question is the following: when you want to switch the local currency you are working with, the proposed way is to create a new company code with new local currency. Should we go through all the settings or there is an easier way?

Thank you in advance,

Peter K.

entry.title: Transaction REISBDCT error, Field symbol has not been assigned yet.
entry.content: When I call the transaction "REISBDCT - Fixtures/Fittings for Master Data", I get the error Field symbol has not been assigned yet.

entry.title: CFL/SCFD_EUI - Custom database fields with compounding F4 help
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to create a new field say 'Storage location' in SAP GUI and enabled for "Custom fields and Logic" using SCFD_EUI. We are having a problem in defining the value help for this as we need to have F4 based on the 'Plant' field present in the standard app.

Please guide us how can we create search helps with plant/company code dependent in CFL enabled with SCFD_EUI. 

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Intercompany Code Subcontracting Process from perspective of Supplier
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community Members, can you please suggest Steps/Processes for following SAP Business Scenario

  1. Company A and Company B belong to same Group of Companies and have SAP implemented, but each of them has different company Codes.
  2. The Company B is Subcontracting Supplier of the Company A which is the Customer.
  3. What method can be used by Company B to do GR from Company A for Processing/Subcontracting.
  4. Also, the material received at Company B should only be updated Quantity wise in its stock. Since it is valuated stock for Company A.
  5. Once the material is processed at Company B what method can be used to dispatch the processed material from Company B to Company A. This should also consider the revision of stock.

Abstract: In short, what can be the process for Intercompany Code Subcontracting Process from the perspective of Supplier i.e. Company B?

Your suggestions are deeply appreciated.

entry.title: Difference between Substitution and Supersession in S/4 and FIORI
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

After reading many posts about Substitution and Supersession différences, i didn't understand.

Up to now I knew:
- Substitutions in ECC managed with Tcode VB12
- Interchangeability groups managed in APO with Tcode /INCMD/UI

I see that S/4 still refers to VB12 but added the concept of Supersessions in FIORI.

Please clarify the pros and cons for using one or the other.

Thank you.

entry.title: Business Partner as leading object in ECC
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently working on a preproject for and S/4HANA conversion and in doing so we need to activate the CVI.

As you probably know usually the BP will only get activated technically as it is a prerequisite for the conversion and the customer/supplier remain the leading object while still on ECC.

My client now requests to use the Business Partner as the leading object on ECC already, but I cannot find any documentation on that, nor do I have any experience with it.

Does anyone of you know if it is even possible to make use of the Business Partner as Customer/Supplier before going to S/4HANA and what the consequences would this have on the ECC system?

Hope you can help me out with this, thanks in advance.

 

Best regards,

Sebastian

entry.title: GR With Multiple Line split - PPV and Tariff
entry.content: Hi Experts, We have the below scenario on tariff :  Standard cost is used. Use case is the tariff need to be captured as separate line. Example: Standard cost is $4 for SKU1 / EA .  Purchase info record for SKU1 has price $5 and Tariff is 20% on purchase price. When the PO is created the line item should show the price of SKU1 as $6.  Total PO price of SKU1 PO has Price $6 . Out of $6 , $1 for Tariff and for $1 it should go to PPV. Now when the GR is posted we want Tariff $1 to post as a separate line item . The entry should be Inventory Acct 100000 Dr $4 PPV Acct 560005 Dr $1 Tariff Acct 400000 Dr$1 GR IR Accr 210000 Cr $6. We created ZTRF and included in the PO  as a condition  ZTRF and created a transaction key ZTR and included this in OBYC and assigned a GL Account that corresponds to Tariff. However when GR is created system is posting entry as below ( Inventory $4 Dr, GR/IR $6 Cr, PPV $2 Dr . instead of generating a separate line item for Tariff as below Inventory $4 Dr, GR/IR $6, PPV$1Dr,Tariff $1 Dr.  Can you suggest how to generate the seperate line item for Tariff. Thanks

entry.title: IN Payroll: Tax Computation statements required (Old / New Regime wise)
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Client is asking for Employee wise tax computation statements for Old and New Regime options in order to decide which one is better option for them.  The statement should show how much tax amounts shall be deducted.  

Please suggest any reports available in SAP which will useful for Payroll Administrators.

entry.title: Planned values remain in FAAT_PLAN_VALUE after asset deletion via AS06 – causing period-end close er
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I hope this message finds you well.
We are currently facing a challenging issue in a customer system running SAP S/4HANA ,
and I would greatly appreciate your insights or shared experience if anyone has encountered a similar case.
__________________________________________________________________

Scenario:
Assets have been fully deleted using transaction AS06.

However, FAAT_PLAN_VALUE still contains planned value entries for those asset numbers.

The XPOST flag in these records is set to 'X', causing the system to treat them as planned assets.

This leads to blocking errors during period-end closing, such as:

“Book values are incomplete” messages,

Inconsistencies in depreciation runs,

Company codes failing to close due to unresolved planned values.

__________________________________________________________________
Questions :
1. Is this behavior expected in ALA?
Are planned values not automatically removed when the asset master is deleted (i.e., is this by design)?

2. Does SAP offer any standard cleanup report or internal tool
to remove such orphaned records from FAAT_PLAN_VALUE?

3. If not, are there any SAP-recommended methods or best practices to safely remove these entries
without compromising data consistency?

__________________________________________________________________
 Final Words:
As I have not yet been granted access to the relevant S-user authorizations from the customer client,
I am reaching out here to seek insights and advice from experienced experts in the community.

Thank you very much in advance for your time and kind support. (--) 

Warm regards,
Sera

entry.title: While executing CIF IM 'ATP-PPM' then getting error message 'Message No. MM108' (No alternative unit
entry.content:
Hi,

An error is encountered, while executing CIF integration model PPM integration model. The error appears as 'No alternative unit of measure specified', Message No. MM108. At that time no error queues appeared neither inbound / outbound in APO nor in S4H. Thanks !

entry.title: CIF errror message 'Message No. MM108' (No alternative unit of measure specified)
entry.content: While doing CIF for the PPM integration model. The error appears as 'No alternative unit of measure specified', Message No. MM108. At that time no error queues appeared neither inbound / outbound in APO nor in S4H. Please suggest, in case any possible solution is there.... thanks!

entry.title: How to impact new batch number creation ?
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to implement custom logic, base on which system will:

create new batch number for received material

or will use the last batch number for that specific material

which exit shoud I use?
